content: I'm feeling really overwhelmed with work and taking care of my parents. I don't know how much more of this I can handle.
I'm so sorry to hear that, River. It sounds like you're dealing with a lot. Can you tell me a bit more about what's been going on with your parents?
Well, my mom has dementia and my dad has Parkinson's. They live with me in Portland, and I'm trying to balance my job as a Blockchain Developer with taking care of them. It's just really tough.
I can imagine. That sounds incredibly challenging. Have you considered reaching out to any local resources or support groups for caregivers?

Yeah, I've looked into a few things. There's a great organization here in Portland that offers respite care, which has been a huge help. But I'm also trying to make sure I take care of myself, you know? I've been trying to get out for runs whenever I can, and I've even started taking up leatherworking as a hobby.

That's great that you're prioritizing self-care, River. Exercise and creative pursuits can be really great stress-relievers. Do you find that your hobby helps you clear your head and focus on your work as a developer?

Definitely. And it's also nice to have something that's just mine, you know? Something that doesn't involve code or caregiving. Although, I have to say, my parents are really proud of the work I'm doing in the DeFi space. My mom may not always remember what I do, but when she does, she's always so supportive.

That's wonderful, River. It's clear that your parents are important to you, and it's great that you have a strong support system. What are your plans for the upcoming weekend? Do you have any fun activities or events planned?

Actually, I'm planning on running a half-marathon on Saturday. I've been training for it for weeks, and I'm really excited to get out there and push myself. After that, I'll probably spend some time with my parents and catch up on some work.

Wow, congratulations on the half-marathon, River! That's a huge accomplishment. I hope you have a great time and get to enjoy some well-deserved rest afterwards. Do you have any other big goals or plans for the rest of the year?

Well, I've been thinking about doing a full marathon next year. And I'd also like to start DJing again - I used to love doing it in college, and I think it would be a great way to relax and express myself creatively.

That sounds like a great plan, River. It's always exciting to have new goals and challenges to look forward to. I'll be here to support you every step of the way. Is there anything else you'd like to talk about or any other way I can help you today?
No, that's all for now. Thanks for listening and offering some advice - it really means a lot to me.
You're welcome, River. It was my pleasure to chat with you. Take care of yourself and your parents, and don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything else.
